title: Dynamic price and stock updates on variant selection

requirements.summary: Update ProductDetail page to dynamically show selected variant's price and stock without page reload
acceptanceCriteria: The price shown on the product detail page updates immediately when a different variant is selected.
The stock status (in stock / out of stock count) updates immediately when a different variant is selected.
If the selected variant has zero stock, the Add to Cart button is disabled and an out-of-stock message is shown.
The initial render shows the price and stock of the first/default variant (or base product if no variant is pre-selected).
No backend call is triggered solely for the price/stock update — the data already present in the product query is used.

file_operations.description: Add state to track the currently selected variant index. Create a function to compute the effective price by adding the base product price to the selected variant's priceAdjustment. Create a function to compute the effective stock by adding the base product stock to the selected variant's stockAdjustment. Update the price display to show the computed price whenever the selected variant changes. Update the stock display to show the computed stock whenever the selected variant changes. Disable the Add to Cart button and show an out-of-stock message when the computed stock is zero or negative. Ensure the initial render uses the first variant (index 0) if variants exist, otherwise show the base product price and stock.

requirements.summary: Update ProductCard component to dynamically show selected variant's price and stock when variant selection is exposed
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting a variant on a ProductCard updates the price displayed on that card.
Selecting a variant on a ProductCard updates the stock status badge on that card.
Changes are local to that card and do not affect other cards.

file_operations.description: Add state to track the currently selected variant index for the card. Create a function to compute the effective price by adding the base product price to the selected variant's priceAdjustment. Create a function to compute the effective stock by adding the base product stock to the selected variant's stockAdjustment. Update the displayed price to reflect the computed price when a variant is selected. Update the stock badge or status display to reflect the computed stock when a variant is selected. Ensure all computed values are isolated to this card instance and do not affect other ProductCard instances. If variant selection UI is not currently present on the card, add a minimal variant selector (e.g., a dropdown or button group) that allows users to choose a variant.
